---
title: "Reference"
description: "Every workflow and module, grouped by task and filterable by package."
order: 0
listing:
  - id: ref-listing
    contents:
      - "openpipeline/*/*/*.qmd"
      - "openpipeline_spatial/*/*/*.qmd"
      - "openpipeline_qc/*/*/*.qmd"
      - "openpipeline_rapids/*/*/*.qmd"
      - "openpipeline_composed/*/*/*.qmd"
    type: table
    fields: [title, namespace, description]
    field-display-names:
      title: "Name"
      namespace: "Package / namespace"
      description: "Does"
    filter-ui: true
    sort-ui: true
    sort: "title"
---

::: {.callout-important appearance="simple"}
**Auto-generated.** Every page here is produced from each package's
`config.vsh.yaml` on release — descriptions, parameters, and examples come
straight from source, so the reference can never drift from the code. Do not edit
these pages by hand.
:::

The five packages each publish into their own folder under `reference/`:
`openpipeline`, `openpipeline_spatial`, `openpipeline_qc`, `openpipeline_rapids`,
`openpipeline_composed`. Use the filter box to narrow by name or package.

:::{#ref-listing}
:::
